title: Get Mode
description: retrieves the current operating mode on the reader

command.description: The value for the key command must be get_mode

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

payload.title: get_mode
payload.description: command to retrieve reader operating mode

verbose.description: if verbose is true it retrieves the entire reader configuration and if verbose is false then it retrieves only whatever operations configured
